app.title: Mahjong Soul Paipu Downloader
app.subtitle: Collect IDs → download logs → convert to MJAI, all in one place
settings.title: Settings
settings.config.label: config.ini location
settings.config.hint: All settings live in this single file next to the executable and can be edited by hand; it is preserved across updates (also mirrored to the user data folder)
settings.version.label: Current version
settings.version.hint: The GUI checks for updates on startup; new versions download in the background and prompt to restart. You can also check manually here
settings.ms_username.label: Account
settings.ms_username.hint: Email or username for the Mahjong Soul CN server
settings.ms_password.label: Password
settings.ms_password.hint: Stored only in local config.ini, never uploaded
settings.pool.label: Backup account pool
settings.pool.hint: On download failure the current account re-logs in first; if it still fails, backup accounts are tried in order. The run aborts (with a checkpoint) only when every account is unusable
settings.res_version.label: Resource version (advanced)
settings.res_version.hint: Leave blank; on error 151 the latest version is fetched and retried automatically, then saved here
settings.collect_timing.label: Collect thinking time
settings.collect_timing.hint: Add per-move thinking ms (think_ms) into MJAI
settings.save_debug.label: Debug mode
settings.save_debug.hint: Also save timing maps and raw actions for debugging
settings.save_raw_json.label: Save raw JSON
settings.save_raw_json.hint: Save raw game records; enabling this forces thinking-time collection
settings.convert_concurrency.label: Concurrent conversions
settings.convert_concurrency.hint: 0 = auto (by CPU cores); conversion drives throughput
settings.python_path.label: Python path (dev mode)
settings.python_path.hint: Leave blank to auto-detect; packaged build has it bundled
settings.work_dir.label: Work / output folder
settings.work_dir.hint: Folder for mahjong_logs output; packaged build defaults to Documents\MajsoulPaipuGUI (logs are kept across updates) — leave blank to use it
settings.locale.label: Interface language
env.title: Environment check
env.fail: Environment not ready; see hints below
env.chrome.missing: Chrome browser not found (required for ID collection)
env.tensoul.missing: tensoul-py-ng not found (please clone it first)
mode.title: Choose download method
mode.subtitle: Decide where to collect paipu IDs from
mode.crawler_mode.label: Collection mode
mode.auto.label: Leaderboard (auto)
mode.auto.desc: Grab top players by period and rank, then collect their games
mode.manual.label: Specific players
mode.manual.desc: Paste player page URLs to collect their games
mode.date_room.label: By date & room
mode.date_room.desc: Collect games of a room within a date range
mode.date_room_player.label: By date & room (per-player)
mode.date_room_player.desc: Visit every player's page for maximum coverage; supports resume
mode.date_room_api.label: By date & room (API)
mode.date_room_api.desc: Fetch UUIDs directly via the amae-koromo API — no browser, faster & more reliable
mode.field.game_mode.hint: Sanma (3-player) is only supported in the pure-API (date_room_api) mode and collects amae-koromo 3-player rooms; download/convert auto-detect sanma and emit the matching mjai.
crawl.title: Collect paipu IDs
crawl.resumeHint: Previous progress detected; will resume automatically
crawl.autoDownload.hint: After IDs are collected, automatically run download + MJAI conversion — no need to start it manually
download.title: Download & convert
download.failedSummary: {fail} download(s) failed (recorded in the checkpoint file; retried automatically on the next run)
download.inputList.label: Game ID list (txt)
download.inputList.hint: One game UUID per line; filled in automatically after crawling, or pick a file directly to skip crawling. Blank = tonpuulist.txt in the work folder
download.noInput: No IDs to download; finish the previous step or set a list in settings
log.title: Raw output (debug)
update.available: Found new version {version}; downloading in the background…
update.stalled: Auto-download of {version} kept stalling (cannot reach the GitHub download host); please download and install via browser
error.LOGIN_FAILED: Mahjong Soul login failed; check credentials (or error 151 needs a new resource version)
error.VERSION_UPDATE_FAILED: Auto-updated the resource version but login still failed (error 151); set MS_RES_VERSION manually in Settings
error.ALL_ACCOUNTS_FAILED: All accounts (including the backup pool) failed to log in; progress was saved to the checkpoint file — check the accounts and run again
error.NO_ACCOUNT: No Mahjong Soul account configured; fill in the credentials on the Settings page first
error.NO_INPUT_LIST: Game ID list not found or empty; crawl first or pick a txt file on the download page
notice.VERSION_AUTO_UPDATING: Detected error 151; auto-updating the resource version and re-logging in…
notice.VERSION_UPDATED: Auto-updated the resource version to {version} and logged in again
notice.SESSION_RECOVERING: Download failed ({msg}); re-logging in / switching account…
notice.ACCOUNT_LOGIN_FAILED: Account {user} failed to log in; trying the next one
notice.RETRY_PREV_FAILED: Detected {count} previously failed item(s); retrying automatically
error.NO_PYTHON: Python not found; set the Python path in settings
error.SPAWN_FAILED: Failed to start the backend process
validation.dateRange: Start date cannot be later than end date
validation.dateFormat: Date must be in YYYY-MM-DD format
